title: Troubleshooting Licensing Issues
text: Troubleshooting Licensing Issues When you start or use a Uniface program, server, database connector, or other licensed feature, the Uniface License Management utility checks that a valid license is available. If there was a problem with obtaining this license, an error is returned in the Transcript Window (for interactive applications such as the IDE) and/or the application log file. For a list of common licensing errors, see Common License Management Errors . Further licensing issues may arise when using the RMS License Manager. For a list of common Sentinel error codes, see Common Sentinel Error Codes . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
